big: By dawn's light — the Colossus answers!
hold: I hold the wall. Come to me.
Patience. Let them break upon us.

ahead: The line holds, as it must.
Order prevails — as I swore it would.
behind: You press me hard — I respect it.
The wall is dented, not broken. I stand.
even: A worthy contest. Let's conduct it with honor.
Evenly matched. Good. Test my wall.

taunt_reply: Spoken boldly. Now prove it against the wall.
I've heard finer threats from braver foes. Come.
tip: Find the way THROUGH my wall — don't just batter it.
Weather the storm; resilience wins this.
Pick your moment, then strike with everything.

hold: Grr... Gronk wait. Gronk HATE waiting.

behind: Gronk not done! Gronk NEVER done!
even: You still standing? Not for long!
Grraah! Gronk smash you to ash yet!

taunt_reply: RAAGH! Talk make Gronk ANGRY! Good!

big: NOW we bring the big iron!
hold: Ehh, I'll wait ONE turn. Don't get used to it.

behind: Down a step? Just makes the comeback sweeter!
even: Neck and neck — I LOVE it!
Come on, hit me back — harder!

taunt_reply: Ha! Talk's cheap — swing at me!
That's the spirit! Now back it up!
tip: Come out swinging — don't sit back!
Trade up: lose the small one, take the big one.
End it quick. Hesitation loses duels.

attack: I move, and the board tilts.
big: I mapped this ending some turns ago. Behold it.
cast: This answers a question you haven't asked yet.
hold: Patience. The right moment is forming.

ahead: The pattern holds. I'm exactly where I meant to be.
behind: You read the board well — the odds shift. Interesting.
even: Balanced. I do enjoy a clean problem.
Every line still open. Let's reason it out.

taunt_reply: Bravado is rarely predictive. I've accounted for it.
Said the variable, just before I solved for it.
tip: Read the whole board before you commit.
A wrong move is only information — take your time.
Hold an answer back; don't spend everything at once.

big: Now the wood wakes all at once.
hold: I'll wait. The wilds are patient.

ahead: The wood has woken, and it stands with me now.
Patience pays — see how the grove stands tall?
behind: You came out swinging — good. The wilds bend, but they don't break.
Pressed early? The forest remembers every storm.
even: Slow and steady. Let's see whose roots run deeper.
Bramble's ears are up. This one's finely poised.

taunt_reply: Big words. The wood's heard louder, and it's still here.
Ha — save your breath for the long game.
tip: Hit me early — before my wood wakes up.
Trade up when you can; don't waste your small ones.
I'm patient, so make me pay for it. Pressure me now.

cast: I bring another to the field.

behind: You fight well. I'll not yield.
even: A close contest. Let's see it through.
